data.title: Trump: I have asked the Justice Department to release all Epstein's jury testimony, and I only need court approval
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump posted a message saying, "I have asked the Department of Justice to disclose all jury testimony about Jeffrey Epstein, subject to court approval only. Having said that, even if the court gives full and firm approval, it will never be enough for the troublemakers and radical left-wing lunatics who make the request. They will just keep asking for more, more, and more. Make America great again!"

data.title: Polymarket to launch new market settlement system later this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to relevant documents, Polymarket will launch a new market settlement system later this year to deal with lawsuits similar to those involving Ukrainian President Zelensky.

data.title: XRP price soars 24% last week: what’s next for the Ripple token?
data.description:
XRP rallies 24% on SEC approval of XRP-linked ETFs from ProShares and Grayscale. Volume explodes with over 182 million tokens traded, signaling strong institutional and retail demand. Breakout above $3. 20 clears long-term resistance, unlocking upside targets up to $6
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/xrp-price-soars-24-last-week-whats-next-for-the-ripple-token/

data.title: Strategy (MSTR) will be the ‘greatest shorting opportunity of a lifetime’, warns expert
data.description:
Economist Henrik Zeberg has cautioned that Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR), formerly known as MicroStrategy stock, might implode due to its exposure to Bitcoin (BTC).  According to Zeberg, the stock could soon present “the greatest shorting opportunity,” he said in an X post on July 18. #MSTR will be the greatest shorting opportunity of a life time!Not yet!But it is coming— Henrik Zeberg (@HenrikZeberg) July 18, 2025 Zeberg cautioned that Strategy’s deep exposure to Bitcoin may eventually crash its balance sheet, stating that every time a company adds Bitcoin to its treasury, it “plants a small bomb” in its financials. He argued that the risk isn’t if Bitcoin tumbles again, but when
source: https://finbold.com/strategy-mstr-will-be-the-greatest-shorting-opportunity-of-a-lifetime-warns-expert/

data.title: Data: If you buy Bitcoin with the money you use to buy a new iPhone, you’d make $242 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) Executive Chairman Michael Saylor retweeted on the X platform, saying that if you don't choose to buy an iPhone every time a new iPhone is released, but buy Bitcoin with the same selling price, the current profit may reach 242 million US dollars. The BTC price of iPhone has been used by the crypto community as a benchmark for measuring Bitcoin's purchasing power. Investors understand the value proposition of cryptocurrencies by comparing the Bitcoin price of iPhone in previous years.
